The Menu

Breakfast, the way it should be

Every plate is made to order. No re-heating, no shortcuts — just fresh batter, hot griddles and generous chutneys.

Our Kitchen

You can watch every tiffin being made

Our newest branch in Bheemaram is built around an open kitchen — because great food has nothing to hide. From grinding the batter to the final drizzle of ghee, it all happens right in front of you.

Spotless & hygienic

A neat dining area and clean counters — cleanliness you can see.

Open kitchen

Watch your tiffin being made. Nothing to hide, everything fresh.

Fresh ingredients

Batter ground daily, chutneys made in-house every morning.

Loved by Warangal
